content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data excluding MANDATORY_READING entries as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data excluding MANDATORY_READING entries as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data

# Table: decision_table

EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description

# Table: eanl

process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld'); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_final; CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR; UPDATE J09B_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT eq1.EQUNR FROM eabl eq1 JOIN eabl eq2 ON eq1.EQUNR = eq2.EQUNR WHERE eq1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(eq1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' AND eq2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(eq2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023');

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR

UPDATE J09B_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT eq1.EQUNR FROM eabl eq1 JOIN eabl eq2 ON eq1.EQUNR = eq2.EQUNR WHERE eq1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(eq1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' AND eq2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(eq2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09B final data excluding mandatory reading entries.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B completed.

- Created and processed temporary data for TOUR `J09B%`
- Applied decision rules and mandatory reading override
- Exported:
  - `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 792 rows
  - `J09B.csv` with 19388 rows
- Sent:
  - Mandatory reading file to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
  - Final non-mandatory file to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary tables (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_final`)
